tasks.task: Set explicit default viewport (1280x720), add --viewport flag for custom sizes
Replace fixed 2s wait with waitForPageSettle() — MutationObserver + PerformanceObserver, 500ms quiet, 10s max
Add --concurrency flag with worker pool (default 4 tabs). Parallel page capture in same browser context
Auto-launch headless Chrome if no CDP endpoint found (--launch flag, or auto-detect). Reuse existing if running
Add --crawl flag with BFS link extraction from rendered DOM. --max-depth N, --max-pages N. Same-origin only
sitecap diff <dir-a> <dir-b> — compare two capture runs. Screenshot pixel diff, ARIA text diff, console/network/storage JSON diff. Plan: tasks/active/CORE-6-diff.md
Add performance capture type — Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) via PerformanceObserver. 7th capture file: performance.json
Add --filter regex for crawl URL include/exclude patterns (e.g., --filter '/docs/*' --exclude '/api/*')
Session video: continuous recording across full capture run + createSession() API for sitetest. Closes #26. Plan: tasks/active/core-12-session-video-2026-03-16.md
MHTML export — save full offline-viewable archive per page alongside the 6 captures
Add --auth flag to load cookies/storage from JSON file before capture (alternative to CDP-attach for CI)
Add --video flag (off by default) to record page video via Playwright context.newPage({recordVideo}). Save as video.webm per page
Open-source readiness — LICENSE, package.json metadata, .npmignore, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md, SECURITY.md fix. Plan: tasks/active/rel-1-opensource-readiness-2026-03-16.md
Return capture duration from capturePage() — add duration_ms to meta object and meta.json
Canned demo capture — run sitecap on sitecap.dev (or sitefix site), commit sanitized output as examples/ for README and landing page
Evaluate sitetest.dev — full UI testing tool with CDP-attached interactions, flows, and multi-capture assertions
Add --wait-for-auth flag: launch Chrome headed with --profile, optionally navigate to --auth-url, wait for stdin Enter, then capture. Closes #11
Add --auto-auth google: automate Google OAuth flow — detect sign-in button, click, select account in popup, wait for redirect. Closes #14. Plan: tasks/active/AUTH-2-auto-auth.md
Investigate API token auth — inject API keys as cookies/headers for machine-to-machine auth. No browser login needed. Test with real SaaS apps.
Investigate Google service accounts — domain-wide delegation to impersonate users programmatically. No browser, no OAuth, no human.
Investigate email/password bot accounts — dedicated bot user per site, auth via --auth-flow YAML (fill email/password, submit). No OAuth dependency.
Library entry point — index.js exporting capturePage, navigateAndCapture, extractLinks, diffCaptures, waitForPageSettle
MCP server — expose sitecap as tools (capture, diff, crawl) for Claude Code and agent workflows
REST API — HTTP server with POST /capture, POST /diff, POST /crawl endpoints for cross-language consumption
Skill.md — /capture slash command for Claude Code
Schema-driven API codegen — defineOp() + Zod schemas → generate MCP, REST, OpenAPI, tools.json from single source. Plan: tasks/active/INT-5-api-codegen.md

CMS auto-detection — detect MODX (window.MODx), WordPress (window.wp, /wp-json/), Drupal (window.Drupal) from page context. Write cms-detect.json per page. Plan: tasks/active/cms-1-cms-detection-2026-03-17.md

MODX adapter — if admin session active, extract templates/chunks/snippets/plugins/TVs/resources via /connectors/index.php API. Write cms.json per site. Plan: tasks/active/cms-2-3-cms-adapters-2026-03-17.md

WordPress adapter — if admin session active, extract themes/templates/posts/pages/CPTs/ACF fields via /wp-json/wp/v2/ REST API. Write cms.json per site. Plan: tasks/active/cms-2-3-cms-adapters-2026-03-17.md

TV value extraction per resource — for CMS pages with structured fields (MODX TVs, WP ACF, Drupal fields), extract field values alongside rendered capture. Plan: tasks/active/cms-4-tv-extraction-2026-03-17.md
Template dependency graph — parse CMS templates to map chunk/partial/include references. Output as dependency-graph.json for rebuild planning. Plan: tasks/active/cms-5-template-graph-2026-03-17.md
Cross-reference TV file refs vs downloaded assets — produce coverage report showing which image/file TVs have local copies and which are missing. Plan: tasks/active/cms-9-media-coverage-2026-03-18.md

Add --download-assets flag to save CSS/JS/images/fonts from network.json to assets/ dir alongside captures. Rewrite URLs in page-source.html to local paths. Plan: tasks/active/asset-1-download-assets-2026-03-17.md
Deduplicate shared assets across pages — single assets/ dir at site root with content-hash filenames. Plan: tasks/active/asset-2-dedup-assets-2026-03-17.md
Cross-origin iframe content capture — use CDP Accessibility.getFullAXTree + DOM for iframe content. Closes #19. Plan: tasks/active/DEEP-1-iframe-capture.md
Click-flow YAML for page exploration — foreach/capture steps to click through tabs, panels, nodes. Closes #20. Plan: tasks/active/DEEP-2-click-flow.md
